stories.headline: HSBC Completes Tokenized Deposit Pilot on Canton Network
stories.tldr: HSBC successfully ran its first public-blockchain tokenized deposit pilot on Canton, simulating atomic settlement against other digital assets in USD, GBP, EUR, HKD and SGD.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: One of the world's largest banks just validated that bank deposits can settle atomically against tokenized assets on a public chain — the core building block institutions have been waiting on before moving real client balances on-chain.
the_details: Pilot ran via HSBC's Global Payments Solutions unit on April 13 using its Tokenised Deposit Service (TDS)
Demonstrated interoperability by bridging HSBC's deposit ledger to an external public blockchain for the first time
Canton Coin (CC) jumped ~3.8% on the news; HSBC says this is step one toward cross-border deposit interoperability

stories.headline: SEC Exempts Crypto Interface Operators From Broker Registration
stories.tldr: The SEC said it will not object to operators of crypto asset user interfaces offering those services without registering as broker-dealers, effective for the next five years.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: This removes one of the industry's biggest regulatory chokepoints — front-end developers and wallet UIs can now operate without SEC broker-dealer licensure, clearing a structural overhang that's hung over DeFi since 2022.
the_details: Guidance issued April 13 by SEC staff under Chair Paul Atkins
Statement is time-limited — considered withdrawn five years from April 13, 2031
Pairs with the 'Reg Crypto' fundraising framework now sitting at the White House OIRA awaiting publication

stories.headline: Ether ETFs Log Best Week of 2026 as Flows Rotate From BTC
stories.tldr: Spot ether ETFs pulled in $187M last week — the strongest showing of 2026 — while spot BTC ETFs shed $325M on April 13 as capital rotates into ETH.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: Cumulative ETH ETF inflows just hit a record $11.68 billion, reversing three weeks of outflows. If the rotation holds, it resets the ETH/BTC ratio narrative that dominated 2025's 'Bitcoin-dominance' trade.
the_details: ETH up ~8% in 24 hours vs. BTC's ~5% gain; Ethereum daily transactions +41% week-over-week to 3.6M
Three prior weeks had seen ~$308M in ether ETF outflows — now fully reversed
Fees and stablecoin transfer volume on Ethereum are both down ~45-50% despite the activity spike, suggesting smaller, retail-sized transactions

stories.headline: X Money Launch Imminent; Product Head Teases Crypto Move
stories.tldr: With X Money set to go live this month, X head of product Nikita Bier posted that 'crypto has had a rough year — maybe we should launch something to fix it,' pulling 677K views.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: X Money rolls out in 40+ U.S. states with Visa-backed peer-to-peer, debit, and deposits — but the crypto tease signals Musk may wire blockchain rails beneath what's officially a fiat product, putting a ~600M-user distribution channel in play.
the_details: Officially fiat-only at launch: P2P, bank deposits, Visa debit card, cashback, 6% APY claim
Licensed subsidiary operational in 40+ U.S. states via Visa partnership
DOGE briefly popped ~8% on the Bier comment before fading; no official crypto feature confirmed

stories.headline: Tillis to Release Stablecoin Yield Draft as CLARITY Markup Nears
stories.tldr: Sen. Thom Tillis plans to publish revised stablecoin yield language this week, clearing one of the last roadblocks before a late-April Senate Banking Committee markup of the CLARITY Act.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: The Tillis-Alsobrooks compromise bans passive yield on stablecoin balances but allows activity-based rewards — a split that sets the rules of the road for a ~$321B stablecoin market and shapes how Circle, Paxos, and banks can compete.
the_details: Markup targeted for second half of April, after Easter recess ended April 13
Three issues still open: DeFi provisions, ethics language on officials' crypto holdings, and community bank deregulatory attachments
If CLARITY doesn't reach the Senate floor by May, it likely slips past the midterm cycle

stories.headline: Lawmakers Re-Up Crypto Tax Overhaul With PARITY Act
stories.tldr: Reps. Steven Horsford (D-NV) and Max Miller (R-OH) reintroduced the PARITY Act, a bipartisan bill that would rewrite how the IRS treats digital assets.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: Current IRS treatment creates tax drag on everyday crypto use — swapping, staking rewards, and DeFi transactions all trigger events. PARITY is the most serious bipartisan attempt yet to fix that without waiting on Treasury guidance.
the_details: Full name: Digital Asset Protection, Accountability, Regulation, Innovation, Taxation and Yields Act
Revised version re-introduced April 13 after stalling in prior Congress
Filed alongside — but separate from — the CLARITY Act market structure push
